name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Describe the Bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Run command '....'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened instead.

## Error Messages / Logs
```
Paste relevant error messages or logs here
```

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 13.1, Windows 11]
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.13.0]
- Docker Version: [e.g., 24.0.7] (if applicable)
- Installation Method: [e.g., Docker Compose, Local pip install]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here (screenshots, related issues, etc.)

## Possible Solution (Optional)
If you have an idea of what might be causing this or how to fix it, please share.
